overall.description: First-person exploration gameplay through a misty mountain landscape featuring a geothermal hot spring, rocky alpine terrain, and ancient stone ruins. The player character walks from a steaming lakeside through grassy fields and climbs a steep rocky hillside toward towering stone pillars and massive skeletal remains under a stormy, overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal hot spring lakeside with steam

agents.ego_description: walking along the misty shore of a hot spring, moving through grassy terrain with pine trees to the left

entered.detail: steaming geothermal water with mist rising from the surface
thick white steam rising from the hot spring
tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the shore
distant stone tower ruins atop the rocky mountain
gravel and rock mixture along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a misty lakeside with a steaming hot spring. The camera moves forward along the rocky shore, with pine trees visible to the left and distant stone ruins atop a mountain in the background. Steam rises from the geothermal water, creating a hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain grassland approaching rocky ruins

events.description: moving away from the hot spring shoreline into open grassy terrain

agents.ego_description: traversing the grassy slope toward the distant stone ruins and rocky outcrops

entered.detail: open field with brownish-green grass covering the mountain slope
large gray rock formation emerging from the grass

segments.scene_description: Leaving the hot spring behind, the scene opens into a wide grassy mountain slope. The stone ruins become more prominent in the mid-distance as the camera advances across the terrain. The ground transitions from rocky shore to grassy field with scattered boulders.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep rocky mountainside with ancient stone pillars

events.description: beginning to ascend the steep rocky slope toward the ruins

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky hillside, navigating around boulders and approaching the tall stone pillar

entered.detail: steep gray rock wall with rough texture
ancient weathered stone column rising from the rocks
large bones of a massive creature visible on the rocks ahead

segments.scene_description: The terrain becomes steep and rocky as the camera ascends the mountainside. A tall ancient stone pillar dominates the view ahead, and large skeletal remains become visible among the rocks. The path winds between boulders and cliff faces toward the summit ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain summit with ancient stone ruins and dragon skeleton

events.description: discovering large skeletal remains of a dragon among the stone ruins

agents.ego_description: exploring the summit ruins and examining the massive bones attached to the stone structures

entered.detail: ancient stone architecture with weathered blocks and columns
massive skeletal remains with ribcage and skull embedded in the rocks
stone structures with curved horns protruding from the rock face

segments.scene_description: Reaching the summit, the camera explores the ancient stone ruins where massive dragon bones are embedded in the rock formations. Horned stone statues and weathered pillars mark this high mountain site, with the skeleton's ribcage and skull clearly visible against the stormy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a hazy geothermal lakeside up a steep mountainside to a desolate summit of ancient ruins. It begins by gliding along a rocky shore where steam rises from a hot spring and pine trees line the path, with distant stone ruins looming in the background. As the camera leaves the water behind, the terrain opens into a wide grassy slope scattered with boulders, bringing the mountain ruins into clearer view. The scene then shifts as the ground becomes steep and rocky, winding between cliff faces and past large skeletal remains toward a towering ancient stone pillar. Finally, the camera reaches the summit to explore weathered pillars and horned statues, where massive dragon bones are embedded in the rock against a stormy sky.
